titles.title: SEPARATE: Storm Event Partitioning And Rainfall Analytics for Tipping-bucket rain gauge data Evaluation

institution.institution_name: School of Environmental Science, Simon Fraser University, Canada
Department of Watershed Sciences, Utah State University, United States of America

citation.article_title: Leveraging a time-series event separation method to disentangle time-varying hydrologic controls on streamflow–application to wildfire-affected catchments
